retry_reason: Put operation is unconditional when e is non-NULL; failure indicates a bug (e.g., double-free) and retrying would be dangerous.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is inode eviction cleanup, not refcount management. The put_binfmt_handler call is one step within broader logic including clear_inode() and list removal.
